overview: Action RPG based on the Chinese novel 'Journey to the West', following the Destined One on a quest related to Sun Wukong. Features transformation mechanics, staff-based combat, and Chinese mythology.
coreMechanics: Staff combat with light and heavy attacks

terminology.Destined One: The player character seeking Wukong's legacy
terminology.Sun Wukong: The Monkey King from Journey to the West
terminology.Transformation: Temporary form changes with unique abilities
terminology.Gourd: Container for healing and enhancement items
terminology.Yaoguai: Monsters and demons from Chinese mythology

commonQuestions: How do I upgrade my staff?
How do I get more gourds?
How do I unlock new abilities?
Is this connected to Journey to the West?
insiderTips: Focus management is crucial - don't spam abilities
Each transformation has specific use cases - experiment
Boss spirits provide powerful abilities when absorbed
Staff combos can be extended with perfect timing
Explore thoroughly - many secrets are hidden
Some bosses are optional but provide valuable rewards
Dodge timing is tighter than most action games

progressionSystem.primary: Talent trees using experience and materials
progressionSystem.gourds: Increase healing capacity and add effects

estimatedPlaytime: 25-35 hours for main story, 40+ for completionist
